name: Tsuchigumo, the Poisonous Mayakashi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>毒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>土</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蜘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters / You can only control 1 "Tsuchigumo, the Poisonous Mayakashi". You can only use each of these effects of "Tsuchigumo, the Poisonous Mayakashi" once per turn.
● If a Synchro Monster in your possession whose original Level is 7 is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect while this card is in the GY: You can banish 1 other Zombie monster from your GY, and if you do, Special Summon this card.
● If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can have each player send the top 3 cards from their Deck to the GY.

eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters / You can only control 1 "Tsuchigumo, the Poisonous Mayakashi". You can only use each of these effects of "Tsuchigumo, the Poisonous Mayakashi" once per turn.
● If a Synchro Monster in your possession whose original Level is 7 is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect while this card is in the GY: You can banish 1 other Zombie monster from your GY, and if you do, Special Summon this card.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
